goal: Write integration tests and cross-cutting wiring: orchestration-MCP, context-runtime, E2E smoke tests

decisions.decision: Mock MCP tool calls at the stdio transport level rather than at the tool implementation level
decisions.rationale: Mocking at transport level tests the full ToolClient round-trip including serialization. Implementation-level mocks skip too much of the stack.

decisions.decision: Context assembly happens before LLM call, store update happens after — no interleaving
decisions.rationale: Clean separation prevents partial context state. Context is assembled once, passed to LLM, then the response updates the conversation store. No mid-call mutations.

decisions.decision: Smoke tests use no external dependencies — all APIs and databases are mocked
decisions.rationale: CI must run without Pinecone, Neo4j, or LLM API keys. Mocked backends still validate the full pipeline flow: message → intent → plan → execution → synthesis.

log.detail: Read all orchestration, context, and prompt modules for integration understanding
Claimed CROSS-001, CROSS-002, TEST-001-005. Reserved test files and integration points.
Implemented ToolClient: wires supervisor to MCP stdio, maps MCP failures to AgentErrorType.TOOL_FAILURE
Wired context engine into agent-loop.ts: assemble context via strategy before LLM, update store after
cd agentic-ai && npm run build — integration code compiles
Wire orchestration-MCP integration and context engine into agent runtime loop
Wrote orchestration unit tests: registry CRUD, CB transitions, error recovery, cost budget, DLQ, routing, batch
Wrote context engine tests: token allocation, cache ops, sliding window, strategy budget compliance
Wrote prompt system tests: Zod schema validation, cache layer building, grounding validator
Wrote observability tests: span creation/nesting, metric recording, cost per model, health aggregation
Wrote E2E smoke tests: full pipeline (mocked), HTTP /health, A2A serialization round-trip
cd agentic-ai && npm run build && npm run test — ALL 5 test suites passing
Add comprehensive test suites: orchestration, context, prompts, observability, E2E smoke tests
Completed all 7 beads (CROSS-001, CROSS-002, TEST-001-005). All tests passing. Released reservations.

summary: Completed all integration wiring and test suites. CROSS-001 (orchestration-MCP wiring), CROSS-002 (context-runtime integration), TEST-001-005 (orchestration, context, prompts, observability, E2E smoke tests). All 5 test suites passing with zero external dependencies.
